assessment_objectives.objective: Personal Data (PD) is corrected, or deleted, upon request by individuals or their designated representatives.
recipients and individuals are notified when their Personal Data (PD) has been corrected or deleted.
recipients of Personal Data (PD) to be notified when their PD has been corrected or deleted are defined.
automated mechanisms used to correct or delete Personal Data (PD) that is inaccurate, outdated, incorrectly determined regarding impact or incorrectly de-identified are defined.
automated mechanisms are used to correct or delete Personal Data (PD) that is inaccurate, outdated, incorrectly determined regarding impact or incorrectly de-identified.
